RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE NOTICE DOES NOT STATE A JUST CAUSE FOR EVICTING AS REQUIRED BY 37.9 A. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/PM)
